description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist architectural style, featuring clean lines and a combination of white, gray, and black exterior surfaces. The structure includes a prominent rectangular main volume with large horizontal windows and an attached garage or auxiliary space extending from one side. The ground level is surrounded by wooden decking, providing outdoor living space and a visual contrast to the sleek facade. The upper floor has a partially open terrace area, and the windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some vertical strips and larger horizontal panes. The house appears to be constructed primarily from concrete, glass, and metal, with wood accents on the deck and possibly some interior elements. The overall design emphasizes openness, functionality, and integration with urban or suburban environments.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of white, gray, and black surfaces, featuring a wooden deck and an attached garage.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the flat roof, open terrace, and the layout of rooms and outdoor decking.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the attached garage, vertical window strips, and the wooden deck extending from the main structure.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the garage extension, minimal window openings, and the solid, geometric facade.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the relationship between the main house and the garage, as well as the terrace and deck areas.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large horizontal and vertical strip windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway is understated, likely featuring a flush door with minimal overhang, integrated into the facade with adjacent vertical windows and direct access from the deck.
